_comment: DNS record source-of-truth for tiptop360.com managed via Cloudflare API. Copy to cf-dns.config.json (git-ignored) and replace example targets with the EXACT values Klaviyo's wizard shows you (Settings -> Domains). See docs/CLOUDFLARE_KLAVIYO_STRATEGY.md.
_rules: Every email/Klaviyo record (DKIM, return-path, click tracking) MUST stay proxied:false (grey cloud). cf-dns-apply.mjs will REFUSE proxied:true on those names.

records.name: kl._domainkey.send
records.purpose: Klaviyo DKIM selector (REPLACE with exact target from Klaviyo wizard)

records.name: kl2._domainkey.send
records.purpose: Klaviyo DKIM second selector if shown (REPLACE or remove)

records.name: send
records.purpose: Klaviyo return-path / bounce alignment (REPLACE with exact target)

records.name: tracking
records.purpose: Klaviyo branded click/link tracking domain (REPLACE with exact target)

records.name: send
records.purpose: SPF for sending host. Merge ALL legitimate senders; keep under 10 DNS lookups; tighten ~all to -all once stable

records.name: _dmarc
records.content: v=DMARC1; p=none; rua=mailto:dmarc@tiptop360.com; fo=1; adkim=r; aspf=r
records.purpose: DMARC stage 1 (monitor). Advance to p=quarantine then p=reject per strategy doc go/no-go
